first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across all sections (justification, strengths, concerns) is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate's strengths in general engineering and tooling but flag the same critical gap in required Java/Kotlin/Spring experience. The minor differences in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in logic based on the candidate's location.
